values.value: Fires when SetupAuditTrail entries in the last 7 days mention Session Timeout. The Display field stores the change as free text, so this rule conservatively raises a finding on every match; triage must confirm whether the new value exceeds the org's policy (typically > 8 hours).

Inspect the audit entry's Display text to confirm the new session timeout value. If it exceeds the org policy, revert via Setup > Session Settings or the affected profile and confirm with the change author. If the new value is compliant, dismiss the finding with a note referencing the policy threshold.
